scripts.desktop:start: bun install && cd src/desktop && bun install && cd ../.. && cd src/desktop && bun run electron
scripts.desktop:web:ui: cd src/desktop && DESKTOP_UI_HOST=127.0.0.1 DESKTOP_APP_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3100 bun run dev
scripts.desktop:web:ui:public: cd src/desktop && DESKTOP_UI_HOST=0.0.0.0 DESKTOP_APP_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3100 bun run dev
